title: koniga variegata
intro: Koniga variegata, also known as King of Bitters or Variegated King of Bitters, is a plant species in the genus Swallowwort, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koniga variegata include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Koniga variegata is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used as a tincture or added to other herbal remedies to enhance their effects.
